summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Iteration 11 features: Rapid Review Sessions with session tracking, Flagged Reviews endpoint, Rescore functionality, Rubric Editor CRUD, and Dashboard Quick Matrix Ref popup. All 20 backend tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed.

issues: Supervisor can navigate to Rubric Matrices page but correctly cannot see Create/Edit buttons. Consider hiding the nav link entirely for non-GM/Owner roles for cleaner UX.

test_credentials: Used GM (gm@fieldquality.local / FieldQA123!), Owner (owner@fieldquality.local / FieldQA123!), Supervisor (supervisor@fieldquality.local / FieldQA123!) from /app/memory/test_credentials.md
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed rubric matrices during backend testing (cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 11 validated all requested features: (1) POST /api/rapid-review-sessions creates session with session_id, (2) POST /api/rapid-review-sessions/{id}/complete ends session and can generate speed alert notification, (3) POST /api/rapid-reviews accepts swipe_duration_ms and session_id, flags fast swipes, (4) GET /api/rapid-review-sessions returns paginated session logs, (5) GET /api/rapid-reviews/flagged returns concern-flagged and fast-flagged reviews, (6) PATCH /api/rapid-reviews/{id}/rescore endpoint exists for rescoring concern-flagged reviews, (7) Rapid Review page renders full-screen with swipe HUD, exit button, progress bar, timer, (8) Rubric Editor page loads at /rubric-editor with list of rubrics, (9) Rubric Editor: GM/Owner can create new rubric with weight sliders, (10) Rubric Editor: GM/Owner can edit existing rubric (title, threshold, categories), (11) Rubric Editor: GM/Owner can activate/deactivate rubrics, (12) Dashboard overview loads compact layout with Quick Matrix Ref clickable widget, (13) Quick Matrix Ref popup opens with division filter, shows rubric table, closes on overlay click or X, (14) Navigation sidebar shows Rubric Matrices link for management and owner roles, (15) All previous features still work (auth, submissions, crew portal).

rapid_review_sessions.create_session: PASS - returns 201 with session_id starting with rrs_
